protocol_gaps: Gap 1: No enforced naming protocol — 5+ schemas in delegation/ alone, documented in use-hivemind-git-memory/references/activity-pathing.md:28-33 but never enforced
Gap 2: pathing/active-paths.json missing — referenced in use-hivemind-planning/SKILL.md:229 but doesn't exist, breaking deterministic pathing
Gap 3: Ghost directories (research/, debug/, git-memory/) — created in SKILL.md but no code creates them
Gap 4: error-log/ mislabeled — 2915 session journals named ses_*.md, not actual errors (~290MB)
Gap 5: 60%+ of files lack date stamps — age determination requires filesystem stat
Gap 6: _meta field name drift — status.json uses created/updated vs standard created_at/updated_at
Gap 7: plans/ vs planning/ semantic overlap — unclear boundary for orchestrator
Gap 8: JSON schema validation absent — 9 JSON files missing _meta entirely
Gap 9: No producer_version field — attribution incomplete
Gap 10: No parent_packet_id linkage — delegation chain unverifiable from artifacts alone

reorganization_recommendations.naming_protocol: REQUIRED format: {category}-{semantic-id}-{YYYY-MM-DD}[-{variant}].{ext}. Categories: delegation, handoff, planning, plans, tdd, verification, review, synthesis, audit, codescan, agents. Examples: delegation/phase-p1-hooks-cqrs-fix-2026-03-25.json, tdd/red/plan-4-red-evidence-2026-03-25.md. ISO 8601 dates in filenames are MANDATORY.
reorganization_recommendations.hierarchy_protocol: Flatten codescan/ to {pass_id}/ only. Purge empty research/ subdirs. Consolidate plans/ (master plans) vs planning/ (plan revisions) with explicit scope documentation. Create missing directories: pathing/, debug/, git-memory/ at initialization.
reorganization_recommendations.timestamp_protocol: ISO 8601 in filenames: YYYY-MM-DD for dates, YYYY-MM-DDTHH-mm-ssZ for datetimes. NO unix timestamps in filenames. In _meta object: MUST use created_at and updated_at field names (not created/updated).
reorganization_recommendations.attribution_protocol: Every artifact MUST contain: _meta.producer (skill|agent|tool name), _meta.producer_version (semver or commit SHA), _meta.parent_packet_id (optional — links delegation chain). status.json field names must be migrated to created_at/updated_at.

top_5_critical_issues: CRITICAL-1: error-log/ is a session journal dump — 2915 files named ses_*.md (~290MB) are session recordings, NOT errors. Cannot identify actual errors. Root cause: no proper session journal system, fell back to mislabeled error log.

CRITICAL-2: pathing/active-paths.json missing — referenced in 10+ skill documents but does not exist. Deterministic path resolution contract broken. Agents use ad-hoc paths. Root cause: skill documentation out of sync with implementation.

HIGH-3: Ghost producer directories — debug/ and git-memory/ referenced in SKILL.md files but non-existent; research/ exists but empty (0 files). Broken producer-consumer contracts. Root cause: skills document directories but no initialization code creates them.

HIGH-4: 60%+ of files lack date stamps — planning/, tdd/, verification/, review/, codescan/ mostly undated. Age determination requires filesystem stat, not filename parsing. Automatic cleanup impossible. Root cause: no enforced naming protocol at creation time.

MEDIUM-5: JSON schema inconsistency — 9 JSON files missing _meta entirely; status.json uses different field names (created/updated vs created_at/updated_at). Parsers must handle two schemas. Root cause: no JSON schema validation at write time.
blocked_routes: Activity folder forensics via pathing/: pathing/active-paths.json doesn't exist — cannot verify deterministic path resolution
Error pattern analysis: error-log/ contains session journals, not errors — wrong data to analyze

(2) Create hivemind-activity-governance skill that validates artifact compliance at write time. (3) Schedule error-log/ cleanup as separate remediation task — migrate ses_*.md to proper session journal storage or delete. (4) Create missing directories (pathing/, debug/, git-memory/) as one-time initialization.
